task: Refactor a target module while preserving behavior and verifying tests.

nodes.name: analyze_current_structure
nodes.prompt: Read the target and produce current structure, proposed structure, impact analysis, and ordered refactor plan.

nodes.name: implement_refactor
nodes.prompt: Implement the refactor from the analysis. Keep behavior stable and report touched files.

nodes.name: verify_refactor
nodes.prompt: Run build, tests, and formatting checks. Fix breakage if localized.

nodes.name: summarize_refactor
nodes.prompt: Summarize files changed, behavior risk, verification result, and remaining work.
